name: @localnerve/editable-object
description: A vanillajs editable-object web component for visual object display and editing

scripts.build: cd src && node build.js && webpack-cli --config webpack.prod.config.js && cd -
scripts.build:dev: cd src && node build.js && webpack-cli --config webpack.dev.config.js && cd -
scripts.test: npm run test:server:bg && sleep 2 && npm run axe && curl -X POST http://localhost:3010/shutdown
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:server:bg && sleep 2 && npm run axe --chromedriver-path=$CHROME_BIN && curl -X POST http://localhost:3010/shutdown
scripts.test:server: SKIP_MIN=1 npm run build && node test/dev-server.js

author: Alex Grant <alex@localnerve.com> (https://www.localnerve.com)
